title: Tasbih at the time of sahar (commending the fast)

duas.title: Tasbih at the time of sahar
duas.description: As mentioned in the book of Iqbal al-A`mal, it is recommended to recite the following invocation of glorifying Almighty Allah (tasbihat):

segments.translation: Glory be to Him Who is aware of what hearts and minds strive to obtain!
Glory be to Him Who knows the exact count of the sins!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْهِ خَافِيَةٌ فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: subhana man la yakhfa `alayhi khafiyatun fi alssamawati wal-aradina
segments.translation: Glory be to Him from whose view nothing in the heavens and the earths is concealed!
Glory be to the Loving Lord!
Glory be to the Unique and Single!
Glory be to the Greatest and Great!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يَعْتَدِي عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man la ya`tadi `ala ahli mamlakatihi
segments.translation: Glory be to Him Who does not transgress against the inhabitants of his kingdom!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يُؤَاخِذُ أَهْلَ ٱلأَرْضِ بِأَلْوَانِ ٱلْعَذَابِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man la yu'akhidhu ahla al-ardi bi-alwani al`adhabi
segments.translation: Glory be to Him Who does not bring down any kind of punishment upon the inhabitants of the earth!
Glory be to the Kind and Compassionate!
Glory be to the Oft-Forgiving and Merciful!
Glory be to the Omnipotent and All-magnanimous!
Glory be to the Indulgent and Liberal!
Glory be to the Discerning and Wise!
Glory be to the Comprehending and All-Wise!
Glory be to Allah at the time of Daybreak!
Glory be to Allah at the time of sunset!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَىٰ إِدْبَارِ ٱللَّيْلِ وَإِقْبَالِ ٱلنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi `ala idbari allayli wa iqbali alnnahari
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah in the zero hours of the departing night and in the twilight of the dawning day!

segments.transliteration: wa lahu alhamdu walmajdu wal`azamatu walkibriya’u
segments.translation: To Him alone is the praise, might, greatness, and omnipotence

segments.arabic: مَعَ كُلِّ نَفَسٍ وَكُلِّ طَرْفَةِ عَيْنٍ
segments.transliteration: ma`a kulli nafasin wa kulli tarfati `aynin
segments.translation: with every breath and every twinkle of an eye,
and every moment is already registered in His all embracing awareness.
Glory be to You for the infinite range that covers Your Book!
Glory be to You—Glory that is equal to the measure of Your Throne!
Glory be to You! Glory be to You! Glory be to You!

duas.reference: 1 Iqbal, 82, , thence in Bihar, xcv, 98-100, b 6.
